page_content:
문맥: 쯔양이 "Live Show Today" 프로그램에서 삼겹살 15인분을 먹고 나서 회전초밥 전문점 '스시 노ando'에서 다양한 초밥을 맛보는 장면입니다. 그녀는 여러 종류의 초밥과 함께 치즈 비프, 새우와 계란, 광어, 연어 등을 먹으며 각 재료의 맛을 평가합니다. 특히, 참치(Tuna)와 비슷한 생선인 삼치(Swordfish)를 발견하고 맛있게 먹는 모습을 보여줍니다.

[00:00 ~ 01:35] Hello everyone~
I just got done filming for the program "Live Show Today"
I ate about 15 servings of pork belly
Let's get it
[Sushi Nokando (Nowon)]
I'll sit here away from everyone
[Conveyor belt sushi]
1,790 Won per plate for the combination selection (~$1.63 USD)
It's passing by
Cheese beef
This is shrimp and egg
Yum
Flounder
Is it not?
Salmon
Tasty
[01:40 ~ 03:45] Tuna
What is this?
I'm not sure what it is Swordfish?
I need to take that!
It's the same thing
That was the best
Crab meat
I better take that
Conch
[Conveyor belt sushi=eating everything in sight]
[Watch out for wasabi]
That was a wasabi bomb
This one tasted really good Shrimp and egg
This is not squid It's cuttlefish
Delicious
Steak tartare

metadata.title: 삼겹살 15인분 먹고 초밥 100접시 가능.. 회전초밥 먹방 Korean mukbang eating show
metadata.next_overlap:
[03:50 ~ 05:19] [Eyebrows of truth]
This one's the bests
That's so good, should I ask for more?

page_content:
문맥: 쯔양이 회전초밥 식당에서 다양한 초밥을 즐기며 맛에 감탄하는 장면입니다. 그녀는 특히 참치, 연어, 그리고 새우와 같은 고급 초밥에 대해 긍정적인 평가를 하며, 여러 종류의 초밥을 주문합니다. 이후, 그녀는 추가로 더 많은 초밥을 주문하고 싶어하며, 다양한 재료를 포함한 특별한 초밥들을 시도해보는 모습을 보입니다.

[03:50 ~ 05:19] [Eyebrows of truth]
This one's the bests
That's so good, should I ask for more?
2 swordfish, 1 eel with roe
1 fish belly
This is the fish belly
Looks good I like this one
Swordfish I like this one too
Almost as good as tuna
So good
Eel with fish roe
[2 seconds per plate]
Excuse me, can I order?
Flounder fin, swordfish,
Kuruma shrimp, and abalone please
Flounder fin sushi
[05:34 ~ 07:23] This abalone for 1,790 Won
Do you have chuck flap tail?
4 please
Steak tartare is mine
Thank you
Chuck flap
This is our last swordfish
[Out of Stock!]
2 tuna tataki
3 flounder fins
You eat a lot
Salmon
[Digesting]
[Round 2 start]
3 fins
Come to me

page_content:
문맥: 쯔양이 삼겹살 15인분과 초밥 1000접시를 먹은 먹방 중, 식사 후 느낀 포만감과 함께 초밥의 다양한 종류와 맛에 대해 설명하는 장면입니다. 특히, 여러 종류의 초밥이 한 접시에 하나씩 제공되는 점을 강조하며, 치즈 스칼롭과 치즈 새우 같은 특별한 메뉴를 맛보고 즐거워하는 모습을 보여줍니다. 이후, 초밥 접시가 예상보다 많아져 혼란스러워하며 실제 섭취한 접시 수를 확인하는 대화로 이어집니다.

[07:24 ~ 09:34] Thank you
Aged kimchi tastes really good
The only reason I can eat 100 plates of sushi after eating pork belly
is because most of these had only 1 piece on it
[Yeah, okay..]
This is on the house
It's cheese
Do the cheese pull
Thank you
I just tasted it and it's really good
What was it?
It's cheese scallop and cheese shrimp
I really like this one
It's even better than before
Wait, what?
What just happened?
[09:34 ~ 10:25] I was like where's my sushi?
Should we count the plates?
[Chat: She ate the plate too] No I didn't!
[A total of 102 plates]
[182,260 Won (~$165 USD)
Where's the exit?
Is it here? No..
Where's the exit?
Use the elevator Oh, right!
